response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack and web engineer, but the profile diverges sharply from this role's hard requirements. There is no indication of Japanese language proficiency (a native-level requirement), no Linux kernel investigation or modification experience, and no background in embedded networking, LAN switches, or security technologies such as MACsec or 802.1X. C experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago; the bulk of the career is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and product development.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software engineering career with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Some low-level and systems exposure: C/C++ at National Instruments, low-latency DLang services, Linux familiarity
Fluent English and demonstrated ability to learn diverse stacks quickly
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — a hard, native-level requirement for this role
No embedded networking, switch, or security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP, NETCONF)
Minimal recent C/UNIX development and no Linux kernel source-modification experience

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and systems fundamentals
